textByHash.37953a5a3a333e319a51b379167e5fff3e1fd4d0: When you've been in the Wilderness as long as I have, you learn that not all monsters show themselves on the outside.
textByHash.88f6e74dd98c745c8a1b106952ef58263d388c0d: I protect other travellers from monsters, both animal and human kind.
textByHash.a2138fc7510c85660be666980cacdd455664cc99: Watch yourself out there, it can be hard to tell friend from foe in these lands.
textByHash.fe0bf77f166682aad6326fad81de1e66113a35e6: Well done! I have new information to share with you.
